# Contributing

Issues and pull requests are welcome.

Good contribution areas:

- better server or client examples
- channel mode examples
- framework-specific integrations
- documentation improvements
- production hardening notes for replay protection and settlement flows

## Local Development

Examples live in `examples/`.

The reusable skill content lives in `stellar-mpp-payments/`.

If you change the installer, keep `README.md`, `.cursorrules`, and `install.sh` aligned so the repo remains publishable as a standalone package.
